description_long: This helmet features a robust, angular shell with a matte dark gray finish and a prominent metallic silver stripe running from front to back along the crown. The front is equipped with a full-face, dark-tinted visor that provides extensive facial coverage and a sleek, modern appearance. Below the visor, the chin area is reinforced and slightly protrudes, offering additional protection. The lower front of the helmet displays a bold, white graphic emblem resembling a stylized eagle with outstretched wings and a shield, adding a distinctive visual element. The sides and rear are smooth and unadorned, with no visible ventilation openings or external attachments. The overall design suggests a focus on impact protection and urban style, suitable for motorcyclists or similar users.
description: A matte dark gray helmet with a metallic silver stripe, full-face dark visor, and a white eagle emblem on the front. The design is angular, modern, and lacks visible vents.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the metallic silver stripe and the white eagle emblem on the front lower section.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the helmet's angular profile and the seamless integration of the visor with no visible vents.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back and the dark visor's lower edge.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the helmet's streamlined, ventless design.
attribute_brand_logo: A white emblem resembling a stylized eagle with outstretched wings and a shield, located on the lower front of the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: White stylized eagle emblem with outstretched wings and shield on the lower front; otherwise solid dark gray with a metallic silver stripe.
